case_title: ANGELINO PETROCELLI VS. AL VIDAL et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,200.00 FILED BY PETROCELLI, ANGELINO AS TO DEFENDANT VIDAL, AL VIDAL, LORRAINE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-16-2010 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PETROCELLI, ANGELINO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VIDAL, AL VIDAL, LORRAINE $570.36 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $620.36, THE COURT DETERMINES THAT DEFENDANT IS NOT LIABLE FOR PLAINTIFF'S PERSONAL INJURIES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-16-2010 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-16-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-16-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT LORRAINE VIDAL WHO WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$NOT GIVEN) SERVED AUG-05-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT VIDAL, AL
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
